testCases.title: Create task with all fields populated
testCases.description: Verify that a task can be created via API with all supported fields and returns correct response

testCases.title: Real-time board reflects task status change
testCases.description: When one user changes a task status, all other viewers see the update within 500ms

testCases.title: Dependency graph shows blocking chain
testCases.description: Clicking a blocked task highlights the entire blocking chain in the dependency graph

testCases.title: AI priority score computation
testCases.description: Verify AI scoring engine produces valid priority scores for tasks with sufficient training data

testCases.title: AI fallback to rule-based scoring
testCases.description: When workspace has fewer than 50 tasks, system falls back to rule-based scoring

testCases.title: Focus mode activates and batches notifications
testCases.description: Activating focus mode suppresses non-urgent notifications and shows only the current task

testCases.title: API performance under load
testCases.description: Verify API handles 5000 requests/second with p95 latency under 200ms

testCases.title: GitHub PR auto-links to task
testCases.description: Creating a PR with task ID in description auto-links the PR to the task
